title: New Geo4Dev platform
notes: Rebuilt Geo4Dev as a fast, open static platform hosted on Cloudflare with content version-controlled on GitHub.
Migrated the full catalog of 129 curated datasets, publications, and training resources from the legacy system.
New full-text search and faceted browsing by category and content type.
Interactive GIS map with selectable base layers (Dark, Light, OpenStreetMap, Satellite), in-map detail popups, and point/outline styling controls.
Dataset pages now include an embedded location map for geolocated records.
Dark, gray, and light display themes.

title: Open contribution rails
notes: Public open-data repository opened for community dataset and publication contributions.
GitHub Discussions enabled for questions, proposals, and feedback.
Email alerts so members can follow new additions and releases.
